# Le Sicilien

> Le Sicilien is a luxury vacation rental company offering private villas and estates in Palermo and Sicily, Italy. We specialize in direct bookings without OTA intermediaries, paired with bespoke concierge services including private chefs, yacht charters, and airport transfers.

## About

Le Sicilien manages a curated collection of historic residences and luxury villas in Palermo and the surrounding Sicilian coast. All properties are in the premium segment (€€€) with full concierge support.

- Rating: 4.9/5 (200+ guest reviews)
- Location: Palermo, Sicily, Italy (38.1157°N, 13.3615°E)
- Contact: lesicilienhouses@gmail.com | +39-327-375-1480
- Website: https://www.lesicilien.it/
- Languages: Italian, English, French, German, Polish, Chinese

## Properties

- [Moncada De Luna Exclusive Stay](https://www.lesicilien.it/stays/moncada-de-luna-exclusive-stay/) — Historic villa in Palermo's city centre
- [Villa Harmony Relax](https://www.lesicilien.it/stays/villa-harmony-relax/) — Beachfront villa near Mondello
- [Tilde Sunset Bay Villa](https://www.lesicilien.it/stays/tilde-sunset-bay-villa/) — Seafront villa with panoramic sea views
- [Fior di Sicilia](https://www.lesicilien.it/stays/fior-di-sicilia/) — Boutique estate in Sicily

## Services

- Concierge service (24/7 guest support)
- Private chef bookings
- Yacht charter and boat trips
- Airport and port transfers
- Property management for investors
